faqs.question: Can teams from other colleges compete in Vibhav Day events?
faqs.answer: Yes, all college students are welcome to join in our Vibhav Day offline fun events  and earn great prizes.

faqs.question: Does only ECE branch can participate in Vibhav day?
faqs.answer: No, any branch students can participate and win prizes

faqs.question: What different events does Team Vibhav organize?
faqs.answer: We  conduct workshops and other events in which everyone can participate.We also conduct ‘ Pahal’ which helps in spreading awareness on social problems by conducting various events like health related discussion etc.

faqs.question: What sets Vibhav apart from other clubs?
faqs.answer: Team Vibhav stands out for its unique blend of technical learning, innovation, and social outreach, fostering both creativity and practical problem-solving skills.

faqs.question: What does Vibhav contributes in nimbus?
faqs.answer: A variety of activities and technical workshops are organized by Team Vibhav.There are several interesting activities and fun games held on Vibhav Day, and participants can win great prizes.

faqs.question: What are the achievements of Team Vibhav?
faqs.answer: Team Vibhav has won NIMBUS Five times and was the top departmental team in Nimbus.
